metrics.name: Next-step completeness
metrics.definition: Share of eligible open opportunities with a current next step recorded, measured in aggregate per workflow window.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Stale opportunity count
metrics.definition: Count of eligible open opportunities without an update inside the agreed freshness window, measured in aggregate.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Record update lag
metrics.definition: Median elapsed hours between a qualifying account event and the matching opportunity update, measured in aggregate.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Forecast review exception rate
metrics.definition: Share of opportunities flagged for data issues during forecast review, measured in aggregate per window.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.
